title: Stone Game Winner
hints: Notice that the total number of piles is always even. How does this parity affect the available choices for the first player?
Consider splitting the piles into two sets based on their original indices: all piles at even positions and all piles at odd positions.
The first player can force the game so that they collect either all even-indexed piles or all odd-indexed piles. Compare the sums of these two sets.
